director.name: 菲利普·S·所罗门 Philip S. Solomon

introduction: The air swarms with hidden energies and engines, invisible broadcasts crackling ominously. History is written in midair, written on the wind, above the clouds or at Ceiling Zero. Secretly. A lethal murmur out of earshot. Scribbled in code. Voices drowned by the roar and the fog of war, spelled out in ruins. This film was originally made in the 1980s and never released until 2023.
